title: Fgrp's Reach DIsplay
description: Displays your hit distance on the HUD — see exactly how far your attacks reached.
body:
# Reach Display

  A lightweight client-side Fabric mod that shows the distance of your hits right on the HUD.

  ## What it does

  Every time you hit a player or mob, the mod displays the exact distance (in blocks) between you and the target. Useful for PvP practice, understanding combat mechanics, or just satisfying your curiosity.

  ## Features

  - **Hit distance on HUD** — see how far each attack reached
  - **Fully customizable** — change color, position, text scale, label, decimal places
  - **GUI settings** — configure everything through Mod Menu (press N in-game)
  - **Drag to move** — drag the display anywhere on your screen with your cursor
  - **Commands** — `/reachdisplay toggle`, `/reachdisplay reset`, `/reachdisplay reload`
  - **Config file** — `config/reach_display.json` for manual editing
  - **Client-side only** — no server mod needed, works on any server
  - **Press "N" for settings**

  ## Supported Versions

  Fabric: 1.21 — 1.21.11, 26.1

  ## Requirements

  - Fabric Loader
  - Fabric API

  ## Optional

  - Mod Menu (for GUI settings)
